{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/npp-v1-1/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "npp-v1-1"
tags:
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. npp-v1-1

_Файлов:_ 23

h2. Содержание

* [[00-abstract-status|00-abstract-status.md]] — 
* [[01-introduction|01-introduction.md]] — 
* [[02-terminology|02-terminology.md]] — 
* [[03-registry|03-registry.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[04-passport|04-passport.md]] — 
* [[05-compatibility-levels|05-compatibility-levels.md]] — 
* [[06-adapter-interface|06-adapter-interface.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[07-portal-entry|07-portal-entry.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[08-q6-space|08-q6-space.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[09-consensus-algorithm|09-consensus-algorithm.md]] — 
* [[10-query-flow|10-query-flow.md]] — 
* [[11-relevance-ranking|11-relevance-ranking.md]] — 
* [[12-onboarding-paths|12-onboarding-paths.md]] — 
* [[13-rest-api|13-rest-api.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[14-sdk|14-sdk.md]] — 
* [[15-security|15-security.md]] — 
* [[16-mcp-extension|16-mcp-extension.md]] — 
* [[17-versioning-policy|17-versioning-policy.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[18-reference-implementation|18-reference-implementation.md]] — 
* [[19-adr-001-federation-over-merging|19-adr-001-federation-over-merging.md]] — 
* [[20-adr-002-q6-first-class|20-adr-002-q6-first-class.md]] — 
* [[21-adr-003-five-onboarding-paths|21-adr-003-five-onboarding-paths.md]] — 
* [[22-glossary|22-glossary.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.60)
* [[103-appendix-b-change-log]] (сходство 0.15)
* [[21-adr-003-five-onboarding-paths]] (сходство 0.15)
